summary: Search for Admins, Candidates and mailbox history for contacts
description: Search for Admins, Candidates and mailbox history for contacts. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/mailbox/contacts. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include q.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query, must be at least 3 characters long

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/mailbox/contacts

Required params: company_id

Optional params: q
